options.content:
# 🎬 WAZUH: Threat Cinema Command Center
**Live SOC movie board** — attack origins, top villains, critical alerts, MITRE moves, agents, and authentication drama.

> Built from your Wazuh/OpenSearch geomap example and expanded into a full cinematic dashboard.

spec.query: data.srcip:* AND NOT data.srcip:192.168.* AND NOT data.srcip:10.* AND NOT data.srcip:172.16.*

spec.label: Severity
spec.name: severity
spec.query: Low : rule.level:[0 TO 6],Medium : rule.level:[7 TO 9],High : rule.level:[10 TO 12],Critical : rule.level:[13 TO *]
